title.en: What makes this my dream adventure?
title.sv: Vad gör detta till min drömresa?
title.it: Perché è questo il viaggio dei miei sogni?

captions.photo1: My sleek bikepacking setup allows me to spend less effort on the road and more effort on the experience. By the way, this spot is just five kilometers from my home in Götene, Sweden.

title.en: What do I expect from this project?
title.sv: Vad är mina förväntningar på resan?
title.it: Che cosa mi aspetto di questo viaggio?

captions.photo1: Tent spot just outside of Abisko National Park. I fell asleep watching the midnight sun struggle to stay above the mountains on the other side of the lake.

title.en: What goes in the bags for a 40-day trip
title.it: Cosa si mette nelle borse per un viaggio di 40 giorni

captions.photo1: The full set of items I brought through Sweden in 2024. I had the same space, same bags, back then as I do for Italy. I will probably bring less warm clothes and more casual clothes. The biggest change is that I am leaving the cooking kit in favour for small luxuries such as casual clothing, notepad, and some creativity-inducing items. Read more below!
captions.photo2: My previous bike fully loaded, with Turning Torso, Malmö, in the background. Containing all the stuff you see in the previous picture.

title.en: Why do I bikepack through Italy?
title.sv: Varför vill jag cykla genom Italien?

captions.photo1: Top of Trollstigen, a famous valley in Norway.
captions.photo2: Ålesund, the last stop on my first bikepacking trip ever.
captions.photo3: An enchanting view along the Flåm railway. The mist over the snow-capped mountain, the bright autumn foliage, and the coarse mountainside... Love this photo.
